hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty"); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; PC=/Users/samanthablasbalg/repos/reading-tracker/backend/venv/bin/pre-commit; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; "$PC" run --files "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { out=$("$PC" run --files "$f" 2>&1) || { printf "%s\n" "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; }
